plugin_desc: Baseline SNMP child template for Zhone/DZS GPON access devices under enterprise PEN 6296. The current MIB facts confirm the enterprise root, but no reliable row-filter-free scalar CPU, memory, temperature, fan or power-supply OID was confirmed. This child therefore declares no vendor-specific metric deltas in metrics.json; the shared Access SNMP floor supplies uptime, IF-MIB interface metrics including 64-bit ifHCInOctets/ifHCOutOctets, and aggregate device traffic. Supported brands/models — Zhone, DZS and DASAN GPON access devices that expose standard IF-MIB.
name: Access
